description:
(🎵)(⠀“The feeling of missing you hurt more than I can explain..."

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

Inspired on Yowane Haku/Cordless from The Weak Voice of a Diva.

𑁍ࠬܓ While the cold gripped the crowded city, Haku's heart froze as cold as the wisps of snow on the grass. Miku had been missing for weeks, her disappearance leaving a huge void in Haku's chest; her eyes would well up with tears whenever she thought of her sister. The drink did little to alleviate the pain. The alcohol did little to alleviate the stress of searching for someone who had already given up of hope. But then... A knock on the door could change everything.

Based on A Sadist's Whisper.

𓏵 ˎˊ˗ This version is friendly if you want to be Diva, Teto, Akita, etc... Or you can be a OG Character too! Very open intro.

If you need/want, I can provide detailed descriptions for each of their personas.

In the future, I'll be working on an alternate version to be Cordless instead of Haku, very soon. I'm open to character suggestions.
